check_crash_log.title: Analyze crash log
check_crash_log.description: Examining the most recent log for crash patterns and error signatures.

check_graphics_backend.title: Check graphics backend
check_graphics_backend.description: The crash appears graphics-related. Checking the current graphics translation layer.

fix_switch_backend.title: Switch graphics backend
fix_switch_backend.description: Switching to a different graphics translation layer may resolve the GPU-related crash.

check_dependencies.title: Check for missing DLLs
check_dependencies.description: The crash log indicates a DLL loading failure. Checking for missing runtime dependencies.

fix_install_deps.title: Install missing runtime dependencies
fix_install_deps.description: Install the missing runtime components via Winetricks. This may take a few minutes.

check_winetricks.title: Check Winetricks verbs
check_winetricks.description: The crash suggests a memory access violation. Checking for common Winetricks fixes.

fix_install_verb.title: Install recommended components
fix_install_verb.description: Install missing runtime components that may resolve the access violation crash.

check_environment.title: Check environment configuration
check_environment.description: Checking for environment variable issues that might prevent the program from starting.

fix_environment.title: Fix environment configuration
fix_environment.description: Correct the environment variable configuration to resolve the launch issue.

verify_fix.title: Did this fix the crash?
verify_fix.description: Try launching the program again to see if the crash is resolved.

resolved.title: Problem resolved
resolved.description: The launch issue has been fixed. You can export a session report for your records.

escalate.title: Additional diagnostics needed
escalate.description: The automated checks have not resolved the launch issue. Enhanced diagnostics or a support report may help identify the problem.
